title: Add Subtitle Studio (SubCap) to video_audio
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt:
- Adds [Subtitle Studio (SubCap)](https://subtitle-studio-eta.vercel.app/) to video_audio
- Subtitle Studio (SubCap) is a browser-based video captioning tool that uses AI transcription to generate styled subtitles from speech without manual typing.

Fixes #11647

gist.headline: Captions, minus the typing
gist.blurb: Subtitle Studio (SubCap) has joined the video_audio garden. Drop in a video, let AI catch the words, then give the subtitles some actual style.
gist.summary: Added Subtitle Studio (SubCap) to the video_audio app directory, a browser-based tool that transcribes speech and creates styled video subtitles without manual typing.
gist.impact: People looking for captioning tools can now discover SubCap through pollinations.ai's video_audio collection and turn spoken video into styled subtitles in the browser.
gist.visual_concept: Depict Subtitle Studio as a cozy retro video-editing desk: a small CRT monitor plays a video with chunky subtitle lines appearing beneath it, while waveform ribbons turn into neat caption cards. Polly wears tiny editor headphones and carefully places a subtitle strip on the screen, with code-plants and flowers around the workstation to show a community app joining the garden.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly, the cute yellow-and-brown striped bee mascot with pink blush, light blue wings, and tiny editor headphones, placing a styled subtitle strip beneath a video playing on a retro CRT monitor; soft waveform ribbons become caption cards beside flowering code-plants. Cozy 8-bit pixel art aesthetic, soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel lavender-to-cream gradient background, warm lighting, retro gaming vibes; pixel-font text on the monitor: "SUBCAP". Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
